title: Vandellia tectanthera
intro: Vandellia tectanthera, also known as Kalmegh or Bhringaraj, is an herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Vandellia tectanthera is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and hepatoprotective properties, which make it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Vandellia tectanthera include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In Ayurvedic medicine, Vandellia tectanthera is commonly used to prepare herbal formulations, including decoctions, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in traditional medicines to treat liver and digestive disorders.
